title: Modesty Blaise
writer: Evan Jones, Peter O'Donnell, Jim Holdaway
actors: Monica Vitti, Terence Stamp, Dirk Bogarde
plot: Stylish ex-con Modesty Blaise and her partner Willie Garvin are tasked by the British Secret Service with preventing her rival Gabriel from stealing diamonds that are to be delivered to her adoptive father, a Sheikh.
language: English, French, Italian, Arabic, German, Dutch
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 nominations total
